name: worldcup-predictor-skill
description: A deterministic World Cup prediction Agent Skill with audited offline inputs.

scripts.smoke: node scripts/predict-match.mjs --home MEX --away KOR > /dev/null && node scripts/simulate-tournament.mjs --simulations 2 --seed smoke > /dev/null && node scripts/generate-lottery-slip.mjs --strategy balanced --budget 288 > /dev/null
